Class TableController

java.lang.Object
logicControllers.TableController
public class TableController extends Object
Controller responsible for physical table management within the restaurant. It handles the assignment of specific tables to groups, occupancy updates, and calculations of remaining capacity.

      public TableController()

  • Method Details

    • getAllTables

      public List<Table> getAllTables()
      Retrieves a full list of all physical tables in the restaurant.
      Returns:
      List of Table entities.

    • getTableByID

      public Table getTableByID(int tableID)
      Retrieves a specific table's details by its unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      tableID - The primary key of the table.
      Returns:
      The Table entity, or null if not found.

    • findAvailableTable

      public Optional<Table> findAvailableTable(int numOfGuests, LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
      Finds the "Best Fit" table for a group of a specific size at a specific time. * Logic: 1. Filters out tables that are too small. 2. Filters out tables already assigned to a confirmed reservation. 3. Selects the smallest possible table that fits the group (to optimize space). * @param numOfGuests Size of the party.
      Parameters:
      date - Requested date.
      time - Requested time.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the optimal Table, or empty if none are available.

    • getTotalAvailableSeats

      public int getTotalAvailableSeats(LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
      Calculates the number of remaining seats available in the restaurant for a given time slot by subtracting confirmed guests from total capacity. * @param date The date to check.
      Parameters:
      time - The time slot to check.
      Returns:
      The count of unoccupied seats.

    • occupyTable

      public boolean occupyTable(int tableID)
      Updates a table's state to 'Occupied' in the database. This is typically called when a guest is seated. * @param tableID The ID of the table to occupy.
      Returns:
      true if the database update was successful.

    • releaseTable

      public boolean releaseTable(int tableID)
      Updates a table's state to 'Available' in the database. This is typically called when a guest pays and leaves. * @param tableID The ID of the table to release.
      Returns:
      true if the database update was successful.
